title: [美漫] DC Comics 聊天室 三月號

replies.msg:
發現都有一兩個巴打會入黎留言 就叫聊天室
出Solicitations果日就開新post 如果下個月重有癮既話
今日出左六月Solicitations 除左一貫連載 都有唔少新書
執幾本講講

DCEASED: DEAD PLANET #1
評價唔錯既elseworld Dceased出極都有
最過癮係Damian, Jon同Cassie分別做左三巨頭
5G條橋黎既喂

BATMAN: THREE JOKERS #1
嘩萬眾期待（如果重記得有呢本書）既三個Joker終於開始揭開謎底
公佈出版日期就終於可以delay喇
你唔係諗住6月真係有嘛

WONDER WOMAN #760
我私心WW所以連載都講, 主要因為
Wonder Woman 1984 variant cover by ADAM HUGHES


WONDER WOMAN 1984 GIANT #1
電影tie-in漫畫 估佢唔到
重收左三個80年代故事

FACSIMILE EDITION方面今次有
BATMAN #321
THE FLASH #135

至於合訂本果d一陣又會取消講黎都晒氣

https://www.newsarama.com/49409-dc-comics-june-2020-solicitations.html
完整6月Solicitations
唔撚好提合訂本
推。有無人會開番個marvel台
屌佢老味呢排睇啱啲hc cancelled哂
等緊佢出doomsday clock part 2
啱啱睇緊Dark Knights: Metal Resistance

replies.msg:
最初係bruce自己電腦search見到golden age, killing joke同n52
之後公佈本書封面就見到有個係殺jason
重有張咁既圖

Geoff johns話個故事好大部分都關係到barbara同jason
但係邊個joker打邊個joker暫時都好難講
分分鐘本書都未必會解答到

Killing joke同death in the family都係post crisis出版
咁為左統一性都會覺得係同一世界同一個joker既舊時
但係killing joke本身其實係silver age
你睇張全家福就知

replies.msg:
三巨頭黎講WW係最易睇
書少 時期分隔較清晰(笑)
基本上分幾個時間：
Pre crisis, post crisis, one year later, n52, rebirth

Pre crisis就係golden age, silver age
Post crisis就係reboot左既modern age去到infinite crisis
One year later就係infinite crisis到flashpoint
N52就係又reboot
Rebirth基本上接住n52不過其實都係又reboot到宜家

睇你對咩有興趣
想睇經典既就golden age
想睇最新就rebirth
想睇好睇既就post crisis

早幾年寫過有咩書值得睇 可以入去望望
https://md.hkgolden.com/view.aspx?message=6733691&&page=1

https://bleedingcool.com/comics/dan-didio-biggest-regret-dc-year-two-new-52/
DiDio talks it out.

"We spent a good six to eight months on Year One, rethinking designs, characters, villains, so it all made sense. As things progressed, moving quicker, we spent less time on development. By the time we get into the third year, we're just dusting things off and dropping them in, not making sense, You feel the wheels coming off the cart. We get to Rebirth, we reinstitute some of the things we felt were missing, but also put in things that made you want to revamp the line in the first place, and things got stagnant again."

Diamond Announces Target Date for Comic Distribution

In the latest update, Diamond announced that they are working toward the distribution of new, weekly product in mid- to late-May. And they have set a target on-sale date of May 20. So we may reprocessing comic order after May 13. But all depending from the practical situation.

Please note that shipments may be delayed, as they work through the significant number of orders that have accumulated during the quarantine measures.

Please follow us to get the update information. Thanks!

replies.msg:
Jason嘅話主要都係rhato v1同v2，仲有red hood/arsenal

如果你願意由p52睇起，我推介由batman: second chances > batman: the cult > batman : a death in the family > Red Hood: the lost day > Batman: under the red hood > green arrow: road to Jericho > countdown to the final crisis > rhato v1 > red hood arsenal > rhato v2 咁樣睇落去

唔係正史嘅話我個人比較鍾意睇DCeased: unkillables(正 在發行中），batman: the adventure continue(畫風好得意，電子版現正發行中），bombshells :United #7-12，Dark Knight Returns The Last Crusade #1，batman Gotham knight #34， batman legends of the dark knight #100同埋batman Arkham Knight genesis

你要睇四隻robin互動就係n52嘅batman eternal、batman & robin、batman &robin enternal、robin war同埋batman li'l gotham，tiny titans都幾好玩下（jason出現係#23 #29 #33 #39 #47）

Comic Distribution Restart Dates Confirmed

Diamond has confirmed, that May 20 is no longer a target but is now the official first on-sale date for their resumed distribution of comics in US. But we may faced another problems, that the cargo may unable to arrive on regular time within this period, as most airlines has decreased their flights. Whatever, we will notify you when receive more updates information. Thank you for your continued support and patience in past a period of time.

Please follow us to get the updates information. Thanks!
